mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_INFO WHERE UI_EMAIL = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{id} AND UCEL_AUTH_CODE = #{auth_code} AND UCEL_AUTH_VALIDITY = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
UPDATE USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG SET UCEL_AUTH_VALIDITY = 'N' WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{id} AND UCEL_AUTH_VALIDITY = 'Y';
INSERT INTO USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG ( UCEL_UI_EMAIL, UCEL_UI_NAME, UCEL_AUTH_CODE, UCEL_REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{auth_code}, NOW() );
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG SET UCEL_AUTH_YN = 'Y', UCEL_AUTH_DATE = now() WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{id} AND UCEL_AUTH_VALIDITY = 'Y' AND UCEL_AUTH_CODE = #{auth_code}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{id} AND UCEL_AUTH_YN = 'Y' AND UCEL_AUTH_VALIDITY = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_INFO WHERE UI_BACK_SEAT_PHONE_NUM = #{phone_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_INFO ( UI_BACK_SEAT_PHONE_NUM, UI_NAME, UI_EMAIL, UI_JOIN_DT, UI_PASSWORD ) VALUES( #{phone_num}, #{name}, #{id}, now(), #{pw} );
